name: Boris Nakshun
notes: Replied 2026-04-27 to Kevin's outreach. Senior eng, contrarian read on microservices ('SaaS hijacked the term, just same HTTP services but micro'). NOT a buyer — explicitly stopped looking due to age + 'AI taking over' resignation. Right target for peer-collaborator framing, not sales pitch. Reply sent 2026-04-27 reframing AI-takeover as MORE-failure-modes thesis, no Bell Tuning pitch, soft offer to share whitepapers if he wants. Watch for 'send the whitepapers' = green light to convert to deeper conversation. | 2026-05-02 00:37: Boris replied with a thumbs-up 👍 emoji to Kevin's 2026-04-27 reframe. Read: polite acknowledgment, not engagement. Likely 'read it, agreed, no further conversation needed' shape. Late-night feed-skimming behavior consistent with the 'stopped looking' framing. Honor the signal — do not pitch, do not push, do not send whitepapers unsolicited. Thread can rest; door stays open for organic future conversation.
next_action: No reply needed. Boris's 👍 closed the thread politely. Drop the planned 'silent 14d → whitepaper link' fallback (the 👍 makes that read as nag). Re-engage only if Boris initiates.

name: LinkedIn boost post — LangChain teardown
notes: Posted 2026-04-30 10:27 ET on Kevin's personal LinkedIn (Thursday B2B peak window). Hook: 0.114 vs 0.235 alignment numbers from LangChain quickstart teardown — top-ranked chunk less aligned than chunk #4. Body avoids eval-framework language (per Hamel-brush-off lesson); frames as observability/APM. CTA = 'npx contrarianai-context-inspector --install-mcp', no audit/Bell Tuning pitch in body. First-comment posted with link to teardown article + context-inspector repo (LinkedIn algo bias against in-body outbound links). Closer asks readers running their own RAG to drop screenshots in DMs — DM channel = qualified-lead filter.
next_action: Monitor LinkedIn views/reactions/comments 30min then hourly through end of day. Reply <60 min to any DM. Watch context-inspector GH clones + landing form fills for downstream traffic. Pin first comment ONLY after 2-3 organic replies land. If the post stalls (<50 views by EOD 2026-04-30): reframe + re-test in 7-10 days with different number-pair hook. If it hits >500 views: extract DM senders into this file as new prospects.
